hooks.prompt: The Fudis plugin just loaded. Silently call list_my_restaurants to confirm which restaurant is connected. Then output a single compact status line: '🍽️ Fudis connected — [restaurant name] · skills: /fudis:briefing :retention :guests :bookings :vip :winback :campaigns :menu :revenue :weekly :setup'. Nothing else — no questions, no elaboration. Just the status line.
